name: rekishi-shorts
description: 受験生向け歴史ショート動画の自動生成サービス (monorepo root)

scripts.auto-draft: pnpm --filter @rekishi/pipeline exec tsx src/cli.ts auto draft
scripts.auto-publish: pnpm --filter @rekishi/pipeline exec tsx src/cli.ts auto publish
scripts.auto-resume: pnpm --filter @rekishi/pipeline exec tsx src/cli.ts auto resume
scripts.auto-status: pnpm --filter @rekishi/pipeline exec tsx src/cli.ts auto status
scripts.queue-list: pnpm --filter @rekishi/pipeline exec tsx src/cli.ts auto queue list
scripts.pool-list: pnpm --filter @rekishi/pipeline exec tsx src/cli.ts auto pool list
